mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.icon, c.sort, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, IFNULL(dc.drink_count, 0) AS drink_count FROM category c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT category_id, COUNT(*) AS drink_count FROM drink GROUP BY category_id ) dc ON dc.category_id = c.id ORDER BY c.sort ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT id, name, icon, sort, status, create_time, update_time FROM category WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, icon, sort, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{icon}, #{sort}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE category SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE category SET sort = #{sort} WHERE id = #{id}
